zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Bunker於1666年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾時，他的父親James Bunker39歲，母親Sarah Nute18歲。他於大約1693年與Mary E Denbo在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1720年3月4日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Bunker于1666年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾时，他的父亲James Bunker39岁，母亲Sarah Nute18岁。他于大约1693年与Mary E Denbo在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1720年3月4日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Bunker was born in 1666, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, James Bunker, was 39 and his mother, Sarah Nute, was 18. He married Mary E Denbo about 1693, in British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died before 4 March 1720, in his hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Bunker(이)가 1666년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Bunker(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Nute(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1693년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아에서 Mary E Denbo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1720년 3월 4일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Bunker nasceu em 1666, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, James Bunker, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Nute, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary E Denbo aproximadamente 1693, em British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 4 de março de 1720, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Bunker родился в 1666 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени James Bunker было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Nute, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary E Denbo около 1693 г. в местности бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 4 марта 1720 г. в его родном городе.
